fields.label: Public Filter?
fields.name: public_filter
fields.instructions: Should this locations show up on public sites in the filter? No would only show up on internal sites.

fields.label: Location Signature Logo
fields.name: location_signature_logo
fields.instructions: This logo will be used in the Signature Generator app. It should typically be in a square format and provided as an animated GIF. Please upload the image to the CDN server first, then paste the CDN link in the field below.

fields.label: Location Signature Footer Graphic
fields.name: location_signature_footer
fields.instructions: This graphic appears in the footer of email signatures for special campaigns or events. It can be updated periodically to reflect current promotions or initiatives. Use a web-optimized image format (e.g., PNG or GIF). Upload the image to the CDN server first, then paste the CDN link in the field below.
